overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character trekking through a snowy mountain pass during twilight. The character encounters and neutralizes an enemy near a wrecked vehicle before continuing through the desolate, snow-covered landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain pass between rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow snowy mountain pass between tall rock walls

entered.detail: steep snow-covered rock wall forming the left boundary of the mountain pass
snow-covered rocky slope rising on the right side of the path
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed mountain pass with steep snow-covered rock walls on both sides. The blue hour lighting casts a cold, desaturated tone over the scene as the character moves steadily forward toward distant mountain peaks barely visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with vehicle wreck

events.description: enemy figure appears on the right ridge and engages the character
enemy figure is neutralized and falls to the ground in the snow
destroyed vehicle wreck becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: engaging and neutralizing an enemy figure near a wrecked vehicle in the snow

notable_agents.action: enemy figure running toward the character from the right ridge

entered.detail: wrecked military-style vehicle partially buried in snow on the left side

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up into a wider snow field where the character encounters an enemy figure emerging from the right ridge. After a brief combat interaction that leaves the enemy fallen in the snow, the character passes a destroyed vehicle wreck on the left. The left rock wall recedes into the background as the landscape becomes more expansive.

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey through the open snowfield after the encounter, heading toward distant peaks

entered.detail: gentle snow-covered mountain slope replacing the steep rock wall on the left

segments.scene_description: Having passed the vehicle wreck, the character continues through an expansive, open snow-covered valley. The steep rock walls give way to more gradual mountain slopes as the character progresses deeper into the desolate, wintry landscape toward the distant mountain range shrouded in mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic mountain pass that gradually expands into a vast, desolate snowy valley. It begins with the character trekking between steep, snow-covered rock walls under the cold, desaturated light of the blue hour. As the terrain opens into a wider snow field, the camera captures a brief combat encounter with an enemy before passing a destroyed vehicle wreck on the left. The scene then shifts as the towering rock walls recede into the background, giving way to more gradual mountain slopes. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the expansive, wintry landscape toward a distant mountain range shrouded in mist.
